effort_rubric.1: Trivial, well-understood change. A few hours; no real unknowns.
effort_rubric.2: Small, self-contained task. About a day.
effort_rubric.3: Moderate task with a couple of moving parts. One to two days.
effort_rubric.5: Substantial task spanning a few components. Around half a week.
effort_rubric.8: Large task with real unknowns or cross-component coordination. About a week.
effort_rubric.13: Very large or highly uncertain — should probably be split into smaller tickets.

tone.title: Short imperative phrase, roughly 3-8 words, naming the outcome. E.g. 'Build file upload intake endpoint', 'Freeze core status vocabulary'. No trailing punctuation.
tone.description: One crisp sentence stating intent — what and why. No filler, no restating the title.
tone.acceptance_criteria: 1-4 concrete, testable, closeable conditions. Each independently checkable; phrase as the done-state, not a task. E.g. 'enforces max size with a clear error'.
